description: Letter from Moshe ha-Levi to a group of unknown individuals. In Judaeo-Arabic. Dated: Thursday, 8 Elul 1743 (אתרקמג) Seleucid = 6 August 1432 CE. The letter discusses the matter of ʿAbd al-Karīm and his wife and how they were asked to report to Cairo, but she is unable to come. Needs further examination.
description_he: מכתב ביהודית-ערבית מהמאה ה-15. מוחזק בהספרייה הלאומית רוסיה.
